description: The Data Engineering Technical Lead is responsible for designing, building, and scaling reliable data pipelines and platforms that power analytics, AI, and business intelligence.
responsibilities: Architect and lead end-to-end data pipelines (batch & streaming)
Design scalable data lakes and data warehouses
Ensure data quality, governance, and security standards
Mentor data engineers and review pipeline designs
Collaborate with analytics, AI, and business teams
Optimize data performance, cost, and reliability

skills.name: Cloud data services and orchestration tools
